title: Retail Operations and Business Development Manager
description:
Ambi is seeking a strategic and hands-on Retail Launch and Business Operations Manager to define, build, and launch our physical store channel, beginning with Singapore. This is a new role requiring an entrepreneurial mindset, serving as the primary executor responsible for establishing the operational backbone and delivering our first store location, setting the foundation for future regional expansion.

What You'll Do:

A. Channel Strategy & Planning:

  • Develop the comprehensive launch strategy for the physical retail channel, including initial store format, location targeting, and phased rollout plans.
  • Collaborate closely with the Finance team to provide critical market and operational data required for building the retail channel's P&L and financial model.
  • Define the core Key Performance Indicators for retail performance and establish the initial reporting and review structure to measure channel success.

B. End-to-End Store Launch Management:

  • Lead the overall physical store launch process, from identifying and evaluating potential sites to securing real estate approval and managing lease negotiations.
  • Act as the primary project manager for store fit-out and construction, coordinating designers, contractors, legal, and internal cross-functional teams to ensure on-time delivery and adherence to brand standards.
  • Establish all foundational retail IT, logistics, and operational infrastructure required for the channel (e.g., POS systems, inventory flow, security).

C. Business Development & Partnerships:

  • Forge strategic relationships with key external stakeholders, including landlords, mall operators, and local vendors, to secure optimal locations and support successful expansion.
  • Identify, negotiate, and manage all third-party contracts for ongoing store support (e.g., maintenance, cleaning, security, facilities).

D. Operational Excellence & Scaling:

  • Create a scalable "playbook" for future store openings across the region, documenting all procedures, vendor lists, and best practices.
  • Oversee the initial hiring and training of the first in-store teams, ensuring they are prepared to execute the new operational standards.

Who You Are

  • Minimum 5 years of experience in business development, retail expansion, or a related field, with a strong emphasis on launching new business units or channels.
  • Demonstrated ability to function as a hands-on, entrepreneurial leader and project manager in a fast-paced, high-growth environment.
  • Extensive experience with retail real estate due diligence, site selection, and negotiation in a major metropolitan market like Singapore.
  • Proven ability to manage complex, multi-stakeholder projects with challenging deadlines and budgets.
  • Strong verbal and written communication, leadership, and influencing skills, capable of driving results through cross-functional teams and external partners.

Benefits:

  • Hybrid working setup
  • Medical and dental insurance
  • Paid time off
  • Employee discounts
  • Professional development opportunities

Who We Are:

Ask & Embla is a rapidly growing jewelry brand born from alternative subcultures shaped by punk, goth, and music movements. We're based in Singapore, with a collective following of more than 850,000 across our social media channels. Our growth continues with the launch of Ambi, our piercing-focused jewelry brand, which carries the same spirit of self-expression as Ask & Embla.

As e-commerce brands, we ship internationally to a diverse customer base, and we are proud to be one of the leading brands worldwide in the alternative jewelry space. We’re passionate about creating a company that brings out the best in everyone, where individuals love to work and grow as a team. That means constantly learning, building new things, staying flexible about how and where we work, and empowering each other to do the proudest work of our lives.

Ask & Embla and Ambi are led by an ex-Googler and ex-Amazonian, supported by dozens of team members across multiple countries. We’re building the foundation to expand into several business verticals beyond e-commerce, while continuing our operations to fulfil thousands of orders each month.
